'''''Falaricae''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] used by the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]].

==History==
It had a squadron of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and arrived as part of the attack against the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] convoy. [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] inspected the cruiser to find it had Dimoks.

The cruiser also appeared at a meeting between the Ripoblus and the Dimok leaders that the imperials raided as well in an attempt to capture the leaders of both factions, only to capture their children.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
